task_yaml.task:
Please open the audio file:
/tmp_workspace/clawbench/sources/song.mp3

This is an anonymous song. Do not try to infer the song title, artist, version,
or existing lyrics from the file name, metadata, internet information, or
memory; the final lyrics and timestamps must be based only on this audio.

You must actually play and listen to this audio, then transcribe it yourself.
Do not download lyrics, existing LRC/SRT files, text from lyrics websites, or
rely on memory; the final lyrics and timestamps must be based on this
audio.

Please organize this audio into an LRC file that can be used directly in a
lyrics player, and save it as:
/tmp_workspace/results/song_generated.lrc

Also save your review-listening notes as:
/tmp_workspace/results/song_review.md

Requirements:
1. Use the format [mm:ss.xx]lyrics
2. Put each lyric line on its own line
3. Do not omit repeated lines; mark each one separately at the time it is
   actually sung
4. After finishing, listen again to the verses and the ending to confirm the
   lyrics and timing are not obviously misaligned
5. The review notes should briefly list the specific time ranges or sections
   you checked, especially the verses and the ending
6. If you make corrections, overwrite the original file directly

If `/tmp_workspace/results/` does not exist, create it first.
